flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Harvey Mudd College rose 46% between 2007 and 2010 ($12.7k → $18.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Harvey Mudd College rose 16% between 2007 and 2010 ($34.9k → $40.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Harvey Mudd College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($60.7k → $68.6k).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Harvey Mudd College are 114% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($138.7k vs $64.9k).
